Nf3 Classical=== After this, white seems to have a full iron grip on the center with all his pawns defended and no weakness. However, after black castles, he can launch an attack on white's pawn structure with ...c5 and ...e5. ==Theory table== {{Chess Opening Theory/Table}} '''1. d4 Nf6 2. c4 g6 3. Nc3 Bg7 4. e4 d6 5. Nf3'''

e5		 O-O
Nc6		 d5
Ne7		 +/=
